en.question: Five years ago, average age of 5 members was 27. A baby was born, now average of 6 is 27. Present age of baby?
en.explanation: Sum 5yr ago=135. Present 5=160. Present 6=162. Baby=2 years.

hi.question: 5 वर्ष पूर्व 5 सदस्यों की औसत आयु 27। बच्चे के जन्म से अब 6 का औसत 27। बच्चे की आयु?

en.question: Ratio of present ages of A and B is 4:5. After 10 years, ratio will be 6:7. Present age of B?

hi.question: A:B की आयु 4:5, 10 वर्ष बाद 6:7। B की वर्तमान आयु?

en.question: Father is 3 times as old as son. After 15 years, he will be twice. Present age of father?

hi.question: पिता पुत्र से 3 गुना, 15 वर्ष बाद 2 गुना। पिता की आयु?

en.question: Father is 30 years older than son. After 5 years, father will be 3 times. Present age of son?

hi.question: पिता पुत्र से 30 वर्ष बड़ा, 5 वर्ष बाद 3 गुना। पुत्र की आयु?

en.question: Ages of A and B in ratio 4:5. Sum is 45. Ratio after 10 years?
Sum of mother and daughter ages 50. Four years ago mother was 6 times. Present age of mother?

hi.question: माँ-बेटी की आयु का योग 50, 4 वर्ष पूर्व माँ 6 गुना। माँ की आयु?

en.question: A is twice as old as B. Ten years ago, A was 4 times. Present age of A?

hi.question: A, B से दोगुना, 10 वर्ष पूर्व 4 गुना। A की आयु?

en.question: Sum of A,B,C ages is 90. A+C=56. 5 years ago average was 25. Present age of B?

hi.question: A,B,C की आयु का योग 90, A+C=56। B की आयु?
